Resource Profile: KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge

Official URL: https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge Version: 1.0.0-kommentierung
Draft as of 2026-03-18 Computable Name: KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge

Copyright/Legal: Im folgenden Profil können Codes aus den Code-Systemen SNOMED CT®, LOINC, Ucum, ATC, ICD-10-GM, ICD-10-WHO, OPS, Alpha-ID/Alpha-ID-SE und ICF enthalten sein, die dem folgenden Urheberrecht unterliegen: This material includes SNOMED CT® Clinical Terms® (SNOMED CT® CT®) which is used by permission of SNOMED CT® International. All rights reserved. SNOMED CT® CT®, was originally created by The College of American Pathologists. SNOMED CT® and SNOMED CT® CT are registered trademarks of SNOMED CT® International. Implementers of these artefacts must have the appropriate SNOMED CT® CT Affiliate license. This material contains content from LOINC (http://LOINC.org). LOINC is copyright © 1995-2020, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes (LOINC) Committee and is available at no cost under the license at http://LOINC.org/license. LOINC® is a registered United States trademark of Regenstrief Institute, Inc. This product includes all or a portion of the UCUM table, UCUM codes, and UCUM definitions or is derived from it, subject to a license from Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and The UCUM Organization. Your use of the UCUM table, UCUM codes, UCUM definitions also is subject to this license, a copy of which is available at http://unitsofmeasure.org. The current complete UCUM table, UCUM Specification are available for download at http://unitsofmeasure.org. The UCUM table and UCUM codes are copyright © 1995-2009, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Unified Codes for Units of Measures (UCUM) Organization. All rights reserved. THE UCUM TABLE (IN ALL FORMATS), UCUM DEFINITIONS, AND SPECIFICATION ARE PROVIDED ‘AS IS.’ ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES ARE DISCLAIMED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ATC. Die Erstellung erfolgte unter Verwendung der Datenträger der amtlichen Fassung der ATC-Klassifikation mit DDD des Bundesinstituts für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (BfArM). Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ICD-10-GM, ICD-10-WHO, OPS Alpha-ID ans Alpha-ID-SE. Die Erstellung erfolgt unter Verwendung der maschinenlesbaren Fassung des Bundesinstituts für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (BfArM). Dieses Material enthält Inhalte aus ICF. Die Erstellung erfolgt unter Verwendung der maschinenlesbaren Fassung des Deutschen Instituts für Medizinische Dokumentation und Information (DIMDI). ICF-Kodes, -Begriffe und -Texte © Weltgesundheitsorganisation, übersetzt und herausgegeben durch das Deutsche Institut für Medizinische Dokumentation und Information von der International classification of functioning, disability and health - ICF, herausgegeben durch die Weltgesundheitsorganisation.

Diese Ressource bietet die Möglichkeit, Informationen über die Kosten eines verschriebenen Medikaments zu dokumentieren.

Usages:

  • Refer to this Profile: KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Alternativen and KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge
  • Examples for this Profile: MedicationKnowledge/1f2be22d-79f1-4469-8c12-55295bb3e950 and MedicationKnowledge/d07718e0-8ac6-43e6-afc6-a662f8ef107a

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice MedicationKnowledge A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

type 0..0 The category of medication document

cost S 0..* BackboneElement The pricing of the medication

dosage 0..0 Dosage for the medication for the specific guidelines

drugCharacteristic 0..0 Specifies descriptive properties of the medicine
contraindication 0..0 Potential clinical issue with or between medication(s)

kinetics 0..0 The time course of drug absorption, distribution, metabolism and excretion of a medication from the body

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice MedicationKnowledge A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from MedicationKnowledge

Summary

Mandatory: 4 elements(5 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 60 elements
Fixed: 1 element
Prohibited: 35 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • KBV_PR_WEST_Medication (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Medication|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge|1.0.0-kommentierung)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Nebenwirkungen
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Wechselwirkungen
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Gegenanzeige
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Alternativen

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.meta.profile
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.code.coding
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.ingredient.item[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.administrationGuidelines.indication[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.administrationGuidelines.indication[x].coding

Slices for coding S 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:$this
coding:pzn S 1..1 Coding ID des Produktes (PZN)
system S 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
version 0..0 Version of the system - if relevant
code S 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
display 0..0 Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..0 If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text S 1..1 string Handelsname
status 0..0 active | inactive | entered-in-error
manufacturer 0..0 Manufacturer of the item
doseForm 0..0 powder | tablets | capsule +
amount 0..0 Amount of drug in package
synonym 0..0 Additional names for a medication
relatedMedicationKnowledge 0..0 Associated or related medication information
associatedMedication 0..0 A medication resource that is associated with this medication
productType 0..0 Category of the medication or product
monograph S 0..1 BackboneElement Associated documentation about the medication
type 0..0 The category of medication document
source
reference 0..0 Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type 0..0 Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
identifier 0..0 Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display S 0..1 string Text alternative for the resource
ingredient S 0..* BackboneElement Active or inactive ingredient
Slices for item[x] 1..1 CodeableConcept, Reference(Substance) Medication(s) or substance(s) contained in the medication
Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this
item[x]:itemReference 0..1 Reference(Substance) Medication(s) or substance(s) contained in the medication
isActive 0..0 Active ingredient indicator
strength 0..0 Quantity of ingredient present
preparationInstruction S 0..1 markdown The instructions for preparing the medication
intendedRoute 0..0 The intended or approved route of administration
cost S 0..* BackboneElement The pricing of the medication
type S 1..1 CodeableConcept The category of the cost information
Binding: KBV_VS_WEST_Preistyp_Code (extensible)
source 0..0 The source or owner for the price information
cost S 1..1 Money The price of the medication
monitoringProgram 0..0 Program under which a medication is reviewed
administrationGuidelines S 0..* BackboneElement Guidelines for administration of the medication
dosage 0..0 Dosage for the medication for the specific guidelines
indication[x] S 0..1 CodeableConcept Indication for use that apply to the specific administration guidelines
Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this

patientCharacteristics 0..0 Characteristics of the patient that are relevant to the administration guidelines
medicineClassification 0..0 Categorization of the medication within a formulary or classification system
packaging 0..0 Details about packaged medications
drugCharacteristic 0..0 Specifies descriptive properties of the medicine
contraindication 0..0 Potential clinical issue with or between medication(s)
regulatory 0..0 Regulatory information about a medication
kinetics 0..0 The time course of drug absorption, distribution, metabolism and excretion of a medication from the body

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error MedicationKnowledge If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error MedicationKnowledge If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice MedicationKnowledge A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from MedicationKnowledge

Summary

Mandatory: 4 elements(5 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 60 elements
Fixed: 1 element
Prohibited: 35 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • KBV_PR_WEST_Medication (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_Medication|1.0.0-kommentierung)
  • KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge (https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_PR_WEST_MedicationKnowledge|1.0.0-kommentierung)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Nebenwirkungen
  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Wechselwirkungen

  • https://fhir.kbv.de/StructureDefinition/KBV_EX_WEST_MedicationKnowledge_Alternativen

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.meta.profile
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.code.coding
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.ingredient.item[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.administrationGuidelines.indication[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of MedicationKnowledge.administrationGuidelines.indication[x].coding
